title: Bakeropteris gleichenioides

The plant's classification is further divided into its kingdom, which is Plantae, and its order, which is Oxalidales. intro: Bakeropteris gleichenioides, also known as Korean Storax or Korean Sweetgum, is a plant species in the family Staphylocarpidae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, skin conditions, and digestive issues.
